== Notes for [[Item:Q3000|Q3000]] ==

Abarbanel – undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman.

Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

--------------------
Lived in Seville and was the treasurer to a Portuguese prince. He was known for his benevolence and wealth.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAC80811EFBBFA9822EF79916C049F
geni:6000000000348791173


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
